scope.primary_subject: WAS/Ontology staged implementation for GlobalCloud project group

phase_goals.goal: Reconfirm governance boundary and latest WAS/GFIS/KDS/WAES evidence chain before any implementation step.
deliverables: GFIS receiving directory remains empty unless real user-provided source record exists
phase_goals.exit_gate: all baseline validators pass and no real-business count is promoted

phase_goals.goal: Prepare the exact intake packet requirements for a future real CustomerRequirementOrPlatformOrder source-of-record.
deliverables: explicit hold reasons when real source record is absent
phase_goals.exit_gate: checklist and matrix remain evidence-only and do not create source records

phase_goals.goal: Run the executable gate chain for source-record precheck, negative fixtures, field crosswalk, WAS profile mapping, and WAS validators.
deliverables: pass/fail evidence with exact blocker if any
phase_goals.exit_gate: all gate outputs pass or execution stops with concrete blocker evidence

phase_goals.goal: Close the 3-hour run with controlled documentation, Loop gate, and next decision boundary.
deliverables: next-step decision: wait for real source record, collect business input, or run another dry-run gate
phase_goals.exit_gate: document governance passes and no production/accepted/integrated claim is made

stop_conditions: GFIS receiving directory contains unreviewed real source-record candidate
any validator tries to promote real_business_lane without real source-record evidence
production write, external API write, deployment, permission change, or Git push becomes necessary
non_claims: does not start an autonomous 3-hour run
does not write into GFIS receiving directory
does not create runtime primary key
does not mark accepted or integrated
